purpose: Ensure aerospace/aviation patent landscape metrics are not over-interpreted.

risk_controls.control: Production metric queries must not use LIMIT. LIMIT is allowed only in preview/sample queries.
Global technology volume uses COUNT(DISTINCT family_id) at field level, not a sum of country-level counts.

risk_controls.risk: publication country confused with assignee country
risk_controls.control: Dashboards label publication-country views as patent-office activity. Competitor/threat views use assignee_country_codes.

risk_controls.risk: classification false positives from broad CPC prefixes
risk_controls.control: Run field-level validation samples. Use representative_field only after CPC + keyword scoring and manual precision review.
Use English title/abstract when available, otherwise fallback to first localized title/abstract and preserve language code.
Use grant_date as a registration signal only. Do not label it as active/enforceable without official legal status data.
Run dry-run first, set maximumBytesBilled, prefer CPC-first, and configure project query quotas.

confidence_labels.criteria: CPC + keyword match, precision >= 0.9, representative samples verified
Broad CPC match or unreviewed field; use for discovery, not firm claims

ui_copy_rules: Use '공개국가 기준' when showing country_code metrics.
Use '출원인 국적/소재지 기준' when showing assignee_country_codes metrics.
Use '권리화 신호' for grant_date metrics, not '유효 특허'.
Use '한국 공백 후보' instead of '한국 취약 분야' unless manually reviewed.
